sections.paragraph:
Original: מדּה

Transliteration: middâh

Phonetic: mid-daw'

BDB Definition:

  1. measure, measurement, stature, size, garment
    1. measure, act of measurement
    2. measurement, size
    3. measured portion, extent
    4. garment
  2. (BDB) tribute

Origin: from H4055

TWOT entry: 1146b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
